svg.text: S355MC material curve preparation for CalculiX
Engineering stress-strain curve converted to true stress / plastic strain
CalculiX input: true stress / plastic strain
Engineering UTS ≈ 493.1 MPa at 14.61 % engineering strain
Last CCX plastic point: 565.1 MPa at εpl = 0.1337
Curve is trimmed at engineering UTS to avoid using post-necking engineering data directly as homogeneous plastic material data.
